rules.filter-warning: You have categorization rules set to queue posts, but the post queue is currently disabled. Posts matching these rules will be published immediately.

server-filtering: ဆာဗာ စစ်ထုတ်ခြင်း
server.filter-help:
Specify servers you would like to restrict from interacting with your NodeBB. Alternatively, you may opt to selectively allow interaction with specific servers, instead. Both options are supported, although they are mutually exclusive.

Note: Silence and Suspend severities are treated identically at present — both fully block interaction. Filter allows interaction but queues content for review.
server.filter-allow-list: ခွင့်ပြုစာရင်း
server.filter-allow-list-help: When enabled, only domains in the core list are allowed to federate. Severity settings are ignored in allow list mode.
core-domains.title: Add/Modify Domain
core-domains.empty: No domains yet. Add domains above to start filtering.

analytics.intro: ခွဲခြမ်းစိတ်ဖြာမှု နိဒါန်း
analytics.details: NodeBB tracks ActivityPub activity receipts and sends, and you are able to view them by hostname, either hourly or daily. Note that a zero error rate is difficult to achieve given that some servers go offline or are configured improperly.
analytics.received: လက်ခံရရှိသည်
analytics.hourly: နာရီအလိုက်
errors.intro: The following %1 error(s) were recorded by this instance within the last 24 hours.
errors.payload-gone: The payload for this error no longer exists.
